Class User

java.lang.Object
org.novastack.iposca.user.User
public class User extends Object
Class that represents a user in the system.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    User(int id, String username, String password, UserEnums.UserRole role, String fullName, LocalDate createdAt)
    Constructor for the User class that is used to authenticate and fetch all users.
    User(String username, String password, UserEnums.UserRole role, String fullName, LocalDate createdAt)
    Constructor for the User class that is used to create users.

  • Constructor Details

    • User

      public User(int id, String username, String password, UserEnums.UserRole role, String fullName, LocalDate createdAt)
      Constructor for the User class that is used to authenticate and fetch all users.
      Parameters:
      id - The ID of the user.
      username - The username of the user.
      password - The password of the user.
      role - The role of the user.
      fullName - The full name of the user.
      createdAt - The date and time when the user was created.

    • User

      public User(String username, String password, UserEnums.UserRole role, String fullName, LocalDate createdAt)
      Constructor for the User class that is used to create users.
      Parameters:
      username - The username of the user.
      password - The password of the user.
      role - The role of the user.
      fullName - The full name of the user.
      createdAt - The date and time when the user was created.

  • Method Details

    • createUser

      public void createUser(User user)
      Adds a new user to the database.
      Parameters:
      user - The user to be added.

    • getAllUsers

      public static List<User> getAllUsers()
      Fetches all users from the database.
      Returns:
      A list of User objects representing all users.

    • deleteUserById

      public static void deleteUserById(int id)
      Deletes a user from the database based on their ID.
      Parameters:
      id - The ID of the user to be deleted.

    • updateUserRole

      public static void updateUserRole(int id, UserEnums.UserRole role) throws AuthenticationException
      Updates the role of a user in the database.
      Parameters:
      id - The ID of the user to be updated.
      role - The new role of the user.
      Throws:
      AuthenticationException - If the user is trying to change their own role while logged in.

    • authenticateUser

      public static User authenticateUser(String username, String password) throws AuthenticationException
      Authenticates the user by getting the user record from the database, then verifying the user's existence. Then, it verifies the user's password by checking the hashed password in the database against the plaintext password. If the user is authenticated, it returns a new User object so that a session can be started.
      Parameters:
      username - The username of the user to be authenticated.
      password - The password of the user to be authenticated.
      Returns:
      A new User object if the user is authenticated.
      Throws:
      AuthenticationException - If the user is not authenticated.

    • getId

      public int getId()

      public String getUsername()

    • getPassword

      public String getPassword()

      public UserEnums.UserRole getRole()

      public String getFullName()
